moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Week
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, concludes this weekend with the Bronze Final on July 18 and the Grand Final on July 19.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The biggest tournament in football culminates this weekend! Who are you backing to lift the World Cup trophy on Sunday?

angles.name: Bronze Medal Match
angles.copy: It's the Bronze Final tomorrow, but all eyes are on Sunday's World Cup Final. Will it be a North American host nation in the final, or a European giant?

moments.title: The Open Championship Live
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in England, running from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Live Golf Action
angles.copy: Golf's final major of the year is live! The Open Championship continues today at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Challenge
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are battling it out on the iconic links of Royal Birkdale. Catch all the drama from The Open Championship this weekend!

moments.title: UK Singles Chart #1
moments.blurb: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean holds the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new Official Singles Chart! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean is still number one! Are you loving it?

angles.name: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean
angles.copy: Another week, another #1 for Sam Fender and Olivia Dean! What's your favourite track in the Top 40 right now?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is wrapping up today in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, having run from July 15-18, 2026.

angles.name: Island Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Last chance to soak up the atmosphere at the Hebridean Celtic Festival! Who made it to Stornoway this year for the music and craic?

angles.name: Scottish Music Celebration
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival concludes today, celebrating the best of music and culture in the stunning Outer Hebrides. What was your highlight?

moments.title: Splendour Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest pop and rock music festival, takes place this weekend, July 18-19, 2026, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival kicks off tomorrow in Nottingham! Who's heading to Wollaton Park for a weekend of pop and rock? Let us know who you're excited to see!

angles.name: Festival Forecast
angles.copy: Ready for Splendour Festival? The weather forecast looks good for a weekend of live music at Wollaton Hall. Get your festival gear ready!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Start
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays for England and Wales are set to begin from Monday, July 20, 2026, marking the start of the main break for many families.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer holidays officially start for many schools in England and Wales on Monday! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun Time
angles.copy: With school out next week, it's time for summer adventures! What are your top tips for keeping the kids entertained this summer?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, featuring a diverse line-up of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Suffolk's Big One
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park next week?

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Getting ready for Latitude? Four days of music, comedy, and arts await in Suffolk! What's your festival essential?

moments.title: Truck Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, known as the 'UK's longest running small festival', takes place at Hill Farm, Oxfordshire, from July 23-26, 2026.

angles.name: Oxfordshire's Indie Gem
angles.copy: Who's heading to Truck Festival next week? Get ready for four days of awesome indie and alternative music in Oxfordshire!

angles.name: Small Festival, Big Vibes
angles.copy: Truck Festival is nearly here! What's your favourite memory from previous years, or who are you looking forward to seeing for the first time?

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24-26, 2026, offering a celebration of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Cheshire's Summer Party
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is coming to Bolesworth Castle next weekend! Get ready for a huge mix of dance, pop, and classic anthems.

angles.name: Rewind & Agora Stages
angles.copy: From dance to pop classics, Together Again Festival has something for everyone. Who's got their tickets for Bolesworth Castle?

moments.title: New UK TV This July
moments.blurb: Several new and returning shows are launching on UK TV and streaming services this July, including 'Trying: Season 5', 'Ann Droid', and 'The Dark'.

angles.name: What to Watch
angles.copy: Looking for something new to binge? July's brought a wave of new TV, from comedy 'Ann Droid' to thriller 'The Dark'. What are you watching?

angles.name: Summer Binge
angles.copy: Summer TV is heating up! 'Trying' is back for Season 5, plus new dramas and comedies dropping. What's on your watchlist?

moments.title: Geezer Butler is 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, legendary bassist and primary lyricist for Black Sabbath, turns 77 today.

angles.name: Metal Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler! What's your favourite Black Sabbath bassline?

angles.name: Sabbath Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Black Sabbath's phenomenal lyricist and bassist, Geezer Butler!

moments.title: David Hasselhoff is 74
moments.blurb: Actor and singer David Hasselhoff, known for 'Knight Rider' and 'Baywatch', celebrates his 74th birthday today.

angles.name: The Hoff Turns 74
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the legendary David Hasselhoff! What's your favourite Hoff moment – Knight Rider, Baywatch, or his music?

angles.name: Looking For Freedom
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 74th birthday to David Hasselhoff! Still 'Looking For Freedom' after all these years?

moments.title: Kali Uchis is 32
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American-Colombian singer-songwriter Kali Uchis, known for her R&B and soul blend, celebrates her 32nd birthday today.

angles.name: Kali Uchis Day
angles.copy: Happy 32nd birthday to the incredible Kali Uchis! What's your go-to track from her amazing discography?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the unique Kali Uchis, turning 32 today! Send her some love!

moments.title: Brian May is 79
moments.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: This Sunday, we celebrate the 79th birthday of guitar icon Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, this Sunday!

moments.title: Carlos Santana is 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock and Latin music, turns 79 on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Smooth Grooves
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana on Monday! Which Santana track gets you moving?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the 79th birthday of the incredible Carlos Santana this Monday! His guitar work is timeless.

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) is 78
moments.blurb: Yusuf Islam, formerly known as Cat Stevens, the influential singer-songwriter, turns 78 on Tuesday, July 21.

angles.name: Cat Stevens Turns 78
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens, this Tuesday! What's your favourite of his timeless songs?

angles.name: Timeless Troubadour
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the iconic singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam! His music continues to resonate with generations.

moments.title: Don Henley is 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist for the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Don Henley! From the Eagles to his solo hits, what's your favourite Henley track?

angles.name: Hotel California Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 79th birthday to the one and only Don Henley this Wednesday!

moments.title: Selena Gomez is 34
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez, a global pop sensation, turns 34 on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop Queen Turns 34
angles.copy: Happy 34th birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez this Wednesday! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: Celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th birthday on Wednesday! Send her some love for her special day!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez is 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her music, acting, and dancing, celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo Turns 57
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez this Friday! What's your favourite J.Lo anthem?

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Celebrating the incomparable Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday on Friday! Her career spanning decades is truly iconic.

moments.title: Mick Jagger is 83
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger this Sunday! What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incredible Mick Jagger this Sunday! The energy is still unmatched.

moments.title: Celebrity Deal Or No Deal
moments.blurb: A new series of 'Celebrity Deal Or No Deal' premieres on ITV1 on Saturday, July 25, 2026.

angles.name: Noel Edmonds Returns?
angles.copy: Get ready for some high stakes! A new series of Celebrity Deal Or No Deal starts on ITV1 next Saturday. Who would you love to see in the hot seat?

angles.name: Weekend TV Fun
angles.copy: Next Saturday night sorted! Celebrity Deal Or No Deal is back on ITV1. Will anyone win big for charity?
